summary: Tested Tally-style Accounting Module (Ledger Management, Voucher Entry, Accounting Books). CRITICAL BUG FOUND: API route conflict prevents accounting voucher creation. Ledger Management and Accounting Books backend APIs work correctly. Voucher Entry backend APIs have route conflict with promotional vouchers system.

critical.issue: Route conflict - Accounting voucher POST endpoint is being overridden by promotional voucher endpoint (line 9720). When posting accounting voucher data, it returns 422 requiring 'code', 'valid_from', 'valid_until' fields from promotional voucher model
critical.root_cause: Two different VoucherCreate Pydantic models exist (line 1625 for promotional, line 31049 for accounting) and both POST endpoints are registered on /api/vouchers
critical.fix_suggestion: Rename accounting voucher routes to /api/accounting-vouchers/* OR move promotional vouchers to /api/promotional-vouchers/*

critical.issue: Returns promotional vouchers (discount codes) instead of accounting vouchers. Response is a list of promotional voucher objects with 'code', 'voucher_type: gift', 'valid_from', 'valid_until' fields

integration_issues.issue: Cannot create accounting vouchers because frontend calls /api/vouchers which hits promotional voucher endpoint instead of accounting voucher endpoint

passed_tests: GET /api/ledger-management/groups - Returns 27 predefined groups (Capital Account, Current Assets, Sundry Debtors, etc.)
GET /api/ledger-management/ledgers - Returns ledgers list with pagination
GET /api/ledger-management/summary - Returns summary stats by type (assets, liabilities, income, expenses)
POST /api/ledger-management/ledgers - Successfully creates ledger under a group
GET /api/ledger-management/ledgers/{id} - Returns ledger detail with transactions
GET /api/vouchers/types - Returns 6 voucher types (payment, receipt, journal, contra, sales, purchase)
GET /api/books/day-book - Returns approved vouchers for date range with summary
GET /api/books/cash-book - Returns cash receipts/payments with opening/closing balance
GET /api/books/bank-book - Returns bank transactions with deposits/withdrawals
GET /api/books/trial-balance - Returns all ledger balances with balanced check
GET /api/books/ledger-wise - Returns transactions for specific ledger
UI - Ledger Management page loads correctly with hierarchical group tree
UI - Summary cards display (Total Ledgers, Assets, Liabilities, Income, Expenses)
UI - Sidebar shows FINANCE & EXPENSES section with all accounting menu items
failed_tests: POST /api/vouchers - 422 Error due to route conflict with promotional vouchers
POST /api/vouchers/{id}/approve - Cannot test as voucher creation fails
POST /api/vouchers/{id}/reject - Cannot test as voucher creation fails
E2E Flow: Create ledger -> Create voucher -> Approve -> Verify in Trial Balance - Blocked by voucher creation failure
action_items: CRITICAL: Fix API route conflict - rename accounting voucher routes to /api/accounting-vouchers/* or /api/accounting/vouchers/* to avoid collision with promotional vouchers at /api/vouchers
Update frontend VoucherEntryPage.js to use new accounting voucher endpoint path after backend fix
Ensure VoucherCreate model for accounting (line 31049) is renamed to AccountingVoucherCreate to avoid naming conflict
critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL: Two VoucherCreate Pydantic models defined - line 1625 (promotional) and line 31049 (accounting) - causes confusion and potential import issues
CRITICAL: Both voucher systems use /api/vouchers endpoint path - FastAPI routes earlier endpoints first, so promotional vouchers (line 9720) override accounting vouchers (line 31161)
Accounting voucher endpoints at lines 31084-31423 are well implemented with approval workflow but inaccessible due to route conflict
Frontend pages (LedgerManagementPage.js, VoucherEntryPage.js, AccountingBooksPage.js) are well structured with proper data-testid attributes
Ledger Management and Accounting Books APIs work correctly - only Voucher Entry has the conflict issue

success_rate.backend: 65% (13/20 tests passed - voucher CRUD blocked by route conflict)
success_rate.frontend: 70% (UI loads correctly, but cannot complete voucher creation flow)

seed_data_creation: Created test ledgers during testing: TEST_Acme Corp, TEST_Cash Account, TEST_Office Expense (auto-cleaned)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Accounting module has a CRITICAL route conflict. Ledger Management (groups, ledgers) works 100%. Accounting Books (Day Book, Cash Book, Bank Book, Trial Balance) work 100%. Voucher Entry is BLOCKED because POST /api/vouchers hits promotional voucher endpoint instead of accounting voucher endpoint. Main agent needs to rename accounting voucher routes before voucher functionality can be tested.

rca_of_issue.issue: Accounting voucher creation returns 422 with 'code', 'valid_from', 'valid_until' required fields
rca_of_issue.root_cause: Route conflict in server.py - two different systems both use /api/vouchers path. Promotional vouchers (line 9720) are registered before accounting vouchers (line 31161), so FastAPI routes to promotional voucher endpoint
reproduction_steps: 2. POST /api/vouchers with accounting voucher payload: {voucher_type: 'payment', date: '2026-02-18', line_items: [...]}
rca_of_issue.mitigation: Rename accounting voucher routes to /api/accounting-vouchers/* and update frontend accordingly
